homepage.hero_subtitle: Rent top-tier Gear at the most optimal cost.
homepage.why_choose_us_subtitle: GearXpert - Rent Gear, choose peace of mind!
homepage.reason_1_desc: All equipment at GearXpert is thoroughly checked before delivery. We commit that cameras and components are always in the best state.
homepage.reason_2_desc: We list rental prices clearly, with no hidden fees. Transparent electronic contracts help customers feel completely secure.
homepage.reason_3_desc: Exclusive SmartGear AI helps you find the most perfect equipment combo based on real scenarios, saving maximum costs.
homepage.step_1_desc: Professional packaging and on-time delivery. Safety guaranteed for every component.
homepage.step_2_desc: Visit GearXpert transaction points to inspect and pick up your equipment quickly.
homepage.step_3_desc: Technical team available to support setup and usage guide at your shooting location.
homepage.pay_1_desc: Instant recharge and payment. Accumulate reward points and enjoy attractive cashback offers.
homepage.pay_2_desc: Support payment via Napas with all local banks and popular international card types.
homepage.pay_3_desc: Automatic payment verification via QR. Fast, accurate, and zero transaction fees.

footer.description: Professional technology equipment rental solution. Manage rentals, track orders and keep operations transparent for your team.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} GearXpert Platforms Inc. Professional equipment rental solution.

smartgear.title: Smart AI Equipment Combo Advice.
smartgear.subtitle: Describe your needs once, SmartGear will suggest 3 combos based on budget and allow direct addition to cart.
smartgear.placeholder: Example: travel vlog for 3 days, need compact setup and long battery...
smartgear.benefit_1_desc: Basic, standard, premium tailored to your description.
smartgear.benefit_2_desc: Clearly see why AI chose each camera, mic, or light.
smartgear.benefit_3_desc: No need to select individual items, saving massive time.
